## Summary

## Hypothesis or problem addressed

## Evidence

- [ ] Positive control included where applicable
- [ ] Negative control included where applicable
- [ ] Fresh-key or held-out validation included
- [ ] Limitations documented

## Verification

```bash
make test
make lint
```

## Security checklist

- [ ] No private keys, mnemonics, wallet files, or tokens
- [ ] Uses only public challenge artifacts
- [ ] No unrelated wallet or infrastructure testing
- [ ] Claimed impact is supported by reproducible output
